Life at Cision

Empower Your Impact

Be seen, be understood, be you.
At Cision we believe in the power of every individual to accelerate brands by bringing your unique perspective to our community.​ 

View open positions at Cision View open positions at Brandwatch

Why Cision?

We're a place where curiosity meets collaboration, and innovation fuels success. We empower our people to champion our customers because your success is the heartbeat of our achievement. ​   

Join us on a journey of continuous discovery, where your ideas shape tomorrow's conversations. 

Our Values

United in Action

We trust ourselves and foster a culture of resilience and proactive problem-solving. We are accountable to one another, value opinions, and communicate with clarity and kindness. We succeed as one, interconnected, global team.

Innovate With Impact

We embrace innovation to create meaningful impact. We are curious, open-minded, and always seeking better ways to serve our customers and improve our processes. We encourage creativity and take calculated risks to drive progress.

Power of You

We believe in the power of diversity and create an environment where everyone can unleash their full potential. Embracing our unique differences is the key to our collective growth and success.

Every Interaction Matters

We believe in the power of moments. From the first hello to ongoing support, we strive to create genuine connections that build trust and mutual respect with our people, customers, and the communities we’re in.

Our People

At Cision, innovation meets impact. When you come to work with us, you join the brightest and most creative minds in the industry.

You’ll work among and alongside a variety of teams making a difference for customers every day - from media intelligence professionals and data analysts who uncover critical insights, to editorial teams who bring those insights to life; from engineers driving industry-leading solutions, to the exceptional talent in our commercial and go-to-market teams,  each and every one of these roles are pivotal in helping us connect brands with the audiences who matter most.

"At Cision, I’m fortunate to work with talented, passionate, and fun colleagues who constantly inspire me to grow. My boss is both a mentor and a friend, always inspiring and motivating me. At Cision, we not only look after each other but also extend this warmth to our clients, growing together for mutual success."

Julie Li
Customer Experience

"As a Cisonier, I am empowered to innovate with impact every day. The culture here fosters creativity, collaboration, and meaningful change. It is not merely about generating novel ideas; it is about addressing real-world challenges and making a positive impact. I am proud to be a part of a company that values innovation, growth, and people!"

Suman Mittapalli
Engineering

"Working at Cision has been an incredibly rewarding experience, largely because of the supportive and collaborative team I work with every day. As a woman in leadership, I’ve felt truly empowered by Cision’s commitment to inclusivity and growth. What I love most is how Cision encourages innovation and real impact. I’ve had the opportunity to streamline processes and implement meaningful changes."

Judia Turner
Finance

"My experience at Brandwatch has been nothing short of stimulating. It's a dynamic playground for those fuelled by action, innovation, and meaningful human interactions. As an “intrapreneur” at heart, I thrive in environments where everyone, regardless of title or seniority, has a voice and a crucial role in challenging the status quo. Brandwatch embodies that spirit. This culture is rare and possible only under leaders who foster both trust and excellence."

Corentin Balmet
Sales

Your Opportunity 

Working here means being part of an award-winning leader in PR, marketing, and social media management technology and intelligence. Our company is always growing, always innovating, and that means a world of opportunities for your career. As Cision grows, you’ll grow, too.

If you want to take the next step in your career journey, apply to Cision today.  

View open positions at Cision View open positions at Brandwatch

Life at Cision

Our employees are our most valuable investment, so we invest in them as much as they invest in us. Working here, you’ll enjoy competitive benefits that enable a fulfilling work-life balance, including:

Quarterly Wellness Days

Paid companywide holidays to devote to self-care.

Mental Health Benefits

Free access to amenities like Headspace and Mental Health First Aiders.

Charity Matching

Matching contributions to charities and non-profits in support of the causes our employees care about

Diversity at Cision

At Cision, we envision a workplace that mirrors the rich diversity of the global communities we serve. We believe our strength lies in building teams that truly reflect the multicultural world that shapes, influences, and inspires our work.

Together, we are building a workplace where diversity drives innovation, equity ensures opportunity, inclusion powers bold decision-making, collaboration transcends boundaries, and belonging is everyone's lived experience. Our shared purpose is to ensure everyone is empowered to be seen, be understood, and be their authentic self—because when we thrive together, we lead together.

 

Our DEIB vision extends beyond our walls to revolutionize how brands connect with their audiences, ensuring every story is told, every voice is heard, and every perspective enriches the global conversation. We achieve this through ongoing education, inclusive leadership development, and by creating clear pathways for career advancement that reflect the diversity we champion.

View open positions at Cision View open positions at Brandwatch
